texto: Cold. Foggy cold. Soaking through fabric, biting into the skin, clutching the bones until flesh crawled.There was no moonlight, only orange, smoky lanterns, and the light made the snow glitter and turned the shadows into blood.
explicacao: Citação de Erik Tavares sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Cold. Foggy cold. Soaking through fabric, biting into the skin, clutching the bones until flesh c…” articula reflexao, horror, foggy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
